markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX's AI Search and content creation services for Ataccama.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GrowthX is a hybrid agency/platform** that uses AI workflows to produce content at scale (5 articles/week), solving Ataccama's core challenge of limited internal content resources.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [**The model is "AI + Experts in the Loop,"** with GrowthX handling execution and Ataccama providing calibration artifacts (personas, brand voice) and final draft reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [**Pricing is flexible:** A fixed fee covers the standard 5 articles/week, but the scope can be expanded to include programmatic content (e.g., 25+ pages/week) without increasing the fee.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [**Ataccama is evaluating a mix of build, buy, and partner options** for AI search, including their current Scrunch subscription and internal efforts. A decision is expected in \~1 week.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Topics

### Ataccama's AI Search Challenge

  - [**Primary Need:** Content creation at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Limited internal resources (one part-time writer).](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
      - [**Result:** Inconsistent content quality and approach across channels.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [**Strategic Goal:** Improve AI search discoverability and compete for market/mind share.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [**Evaluation Path:** Considering a mix of build, buy, and partner options.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [**Build:** Internal efforts (led by David Kolinek) are limited in scale and best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
      - [**Buy:** Current tools include Scrunch for analytics; also evaluating other vendors.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
      - [**Partner:** Exploring agencies like GrowthX for execution.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)

### GrowthX's Hybrid Solution

  - [**Model:** A hybrid agency/platform combining AI workflows with human experts.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [**Founder Expertise:** Marcel Santilli built high-ROI content engines at IBM, HashiCorp, and DeepGram (24x traffic, 4x revenue in 18 months).](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Platform:** Uses proprietary AI workflows to accelerate content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [**Client Access:** A client-facing platform is \~3 months away; current clients will gain access within 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

### Execution Process & Pricing

  - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint (Weeks 1–4)**](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build a "Content OS" to inform AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
      - [**Activities:** Keyword universe mapping, topic cluster analysis, content roadmap creation.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
      - [**Deliverables:** Calibration artifacts (personas, writing guidelines) that are continuously updated.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Growth Execution**](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Standard Pace:** 5 editorial articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Programmatic Content:** Can be added to increase volume without increasing the fee.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
          - [**Example:** Ramp per diem calculator (25+ pages/week from one asset).](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [**Pricing:**](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
      - [**Setup Fee:** \~$40k (one-time).](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
      - [**Execution Fee:** \~$20k/month (fixed for standard scope).](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
      - [**Flexibility:** Scope can be increased (e.g., 10 editorial articles/week) for an additional cost.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Example: Augment Code Case Study

  - [**Client:** Augment Code (AI coding tool).](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [**Content:** 130+ guides, 200+ tool comparisons, 40+ thought leadership articles.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [**Results:**](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
      - [Organic traffic 3x'd from \~$20k/month.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
      - [Paid ad spend significantly reduced.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
      - [Articles now cited for competitor tools (e.g., Cursor).](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler Pavlas:** Send case studies and public resources to the Ataccama team.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [**Ataccama Team:** Complete the internal vendor evaluation process over the next week and follow up with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/-fesY4ys5QGyq-yx_KLzUY9YfZo_9iPP?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
